author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Dawn of the Freighter - LIVE

The full Dawn of the Freighter update is now LIVE in SAGE Labs! Here's what's new:

Local Markets: Trade resources in localized markets, mini economies within each sector of Galia!,Faction Infrastructure Contracts: Formerly known as RFRs, these contracts offer a new way to participate in the SAGE Labs economy, with more predictable and easier to understand earning mechanics. Craft Faction Infrastructure Contracts at any starbase and redeem them for 2 ATLAS each! The catch? Contracts can only be redeemed at 3 designated starbases at a time, per faction, and will periodically rotate. (Note: The 6% Galactic Marketplace seller's fee still applies to selling in Local Markets. The fee can be reduced by locking ATLAS in the ATLAS locker),
"This is the biggest day for the Star Atlas economy since the launch of SAGE Labs" - @Chri.z 

View the full detailed patch notes: ⁠🩹┃patch-notes⁠

 | Play now: https://based.staratlas.com/

Mentions: @Chri.z
